user.title: Broadlink Device Patch
user.description:
Click Submit to enable the patch. The default device (RM mini 3, 0x27C8) will be registered automatically on the next restart.

To add more devices, click Configure on the integration card after setup.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Broadlink Device Patch is allowed.

init.title: Manage Devices

add.title: Add a Device
add.description: Enter the details of the device you want to add.

data_description.device_id: The hexadecimal type identifier reported by your Broadlink device.
data_description.model: A human-readable model name (e.g. RM mini 3).

remove.title: Remove Devices
remove.description: Select the devices you want to remove.

error.invalid_device_id: Invalid device ID — please use a hex string such as 0x27C8.
